texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1) Rates are inclusive of all Government taxes.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all Government taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2) Rates are subject to change without prior notice however; every effort will be made to maintain them. Check in time is from 12:00 noon and check out at 10:00am.
texts.text: Rates are subject to change without prior notice however; every effort will be made to maintain them. Check in time is from 12:00 noon and check out at 10:00am.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3) A 50% deposit is payable to confirm a booking and the balance is payable at check in. Day room rate is 50% of applicable room rate.
texts.text: A 50% deposit is payable to confirm a booking and the balance is payable at check in. Day room rate is 50% of applicable room rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4) Eseriani Resort does not and will not accept responsibility of any incident of any nature involving any client(s) who is/are at any of their properties nor while travelling to or from any of their properties
texts.text: Eseriani Resort does not and will not accept responsibility of any incident of any nature involving any client(s) who is/are at any of their properties nor while travelling to or from any of their properties

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5) Kindly note that a proof of residency is required at check in.
texts.text: Kindly note that a proof of residency is required at check in.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1) In case of cancellation within 24 hours from noon on date of accommodation or noshows, 100% of the booking rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation within 24 hours from noon on date of accommodation or noshows, 100% of the booking rate shall be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2) In case of cancellation within 48 hours from noon on date of accommodation or noshows, 50% of the booking rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation within 48 hours from noon on date of accommodation or noshows, 50% of the booking rate shall be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3) In case of cancellation between 7 days to 2 days from noon on the date of accommodation 25% of the applicable rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation between 7 days to 2 days from noon on the date of accommodation 25% of the applicable rate shall be charged.

table_cells.text: Children below 12 years with exclusive use of the room

grid.text: Children below 12 years with exclusive use of the room
